title: FST waveform dump with Verilator 5.001 and `--binary` option
body:
```bash
$ verilator --version
Verilator 5.001 devel rev v4.216-37-gca42be98
```
I am trying to get a waveform dump with Verilator 5.001 and `--binary` option, so without a custom C++ source file.
Previously I was specifying the dump file in the C++ `main`.

Since I could not find a CLI approach to specify the dump file, I used the Verilog syntax:
```Verilog
initial
begin
  $dumpvars;
  $dumpfile("test.fst");
end
```

This is the build log with an error:
```bash
verilator --binary -O3 -j 0 --timescale 1ps/1ps --x-assign fast -Wno-INITIALDLY --assert --trace-fst --trace-structs -DTRACE_DEBUG  --top tcb_tb ../../hdl/rtl/tcb_if.sv ../../hdl/rtl/tcb_pas.sv ../../hdl/rtl/tcb_arb.sv ../../hdl/rtl/tcb_dec.sv ../../hdl/rtl/tcb_reg.sv ../../hdl/rtl/tcb_err.sv ../../hdl/rtl/gpio/tcb_gpio.sv ../../hdl/rtl/uart/tcb_uart_ser.sv ../../hdl/rtl/uart/tcb_uart_des.sv ../../hdl/rtl/uart/tcb_uart_fifo.sv ../../hdl/rtl/uart/tcb_uart.sv ../../hdl/tbn/tcb_pkg.sv ../../hdl/tbn/tcb_mon.sv ../../hdl/tbn/tcb_sub.sv ../../hdl/tbn/tcb_man.sv ../../hdl/tbn/tcb_tb.sv ../../hdl/tbn/gpio/tcb_gpio_tb.sv ../../hdl/tbn/uart/uart_model.sv ../../hdl/tbn/uart/uart_model_tb.sv ../../hdl/tbn/uart/tcb_uart_tb.sv
make[1]: Entering directory '/home/ijeras/VLSI/rp32/submodules/tcb/sim/verilator/obj_dir'
ccache g++  -I.  -MMD -I/home/ijeras/VLSI/rp32/submodules/verilator/include -I/home/ijeras/VLSI/rp32/submodules/verilator/include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=1 -DVM_TRACE_FST=1 -DVM_TRACE_VCD=0 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow     -DVL_TIME_CONTEXT  -fcoroutines -std=gnu++14 -Os -c -o verilated.o /home/ijeras/VLSI/rp32/submodules/verilator/include/verilated.cpp
ccache g++  -I.  -MMD -I/home/ijeras/VLSI/rp32/submodules/verilator/include -I/home/ijeras/VLSI/rp32/submodules/verilator/include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=1 -DVM_TRACE_FST=1 -DVM_TRACE_VCD=0 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow     -DVL_TIME_CONTEXT  -fcoroutines -std=gnu++14 -Os -c -o verilated_fst_c.o /home/ijeras/VLSI/rp32/submodules/verilator/include/verilated_fst_c.cpp

ccache g++  -I.  -MMD -I/home/ijeras/VLSI/rp32/submodules/verilator/include -I/home/ijeras/VLSI/rp32/submodules/verilator/include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=1 -DVM_TRACE_FST=1 -DVM_TRACE_VCD=0 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow     -DVL_TIME_CONTEXT  -fcoroutines -std=gnu++14 -Os -c -o Vtcb_tb__ALL.o Vtcb_tb__ALL.cpp

Archive ar -rcs Vtcb_tb__ALL.a Vtcb_tb__ALL.o
g++    verilated.o verilated_fst_c.o verilated_timing.o Vtcb_tb__ALL.a   -lz    -o Vtcb_tb
rm Vtcb_tb__ALL.verilator_deplist.tmp

obj_dir/Vtcb_tb 
%Warning: $dumpvar ignored as not proceeded by $dumpfile

make: *** [Makefile:129: sim] Aborted (core dumped)
```
